siteType: demo / reference site (the playground) plus tooling repo

intent.be-sustainable: the playground is a tiny hand-authored demo; weight is already minimal, judge proportionally
intent.be-discoverable: the playground is a localhost demo, not a public page; SEO is illustrative only

optOut.be-agent-ready: the playground is a static demo of UX techniques with no agent-facing surface; not exposing WebMCP tools here
optOut.be-resilient: the playground demonstrates client-rendered modern-UX scenarios; offline/installable is out of scope for this demo (progressive enhancement of core content still expected)
